title: Glazed Gourmet Italian Ume-Plum Iron-Teppan Frittata
description: A shattering Italian frittata featuring ume-plum and herbs, perfect for a date-night dinner.
instructions: Preheat the iron-teppan to 375°F (190°C) in a well-ventilated area.
Whisk together eggs, ricotta cheese, parmesan cheese, parsley, basil, garlic, salt, and black pepper in a bowl.
Heat olive oil in the preheated iron-teppan over medium heat.
Add ume-plums to the iron-teppan and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Pour the egg mixture over the ume-plums and cook for 2-3 minutes or until the edges start to set.
Drizzle honey and lemon juice over the frittata and sprinkle with iron-teppan seasoning.
Transfer the iron-teppan to the oven and bake for 15-20 minutes or until the frittata is cooked through.
Remove the iron-teppan from the oven and let it cool for 2-3 minutes.
Slide the frittata out of the iron-teppan onto a plate and serve hot.
Repeat the process with the remaining ingredients if desired.
Note: Be careful when handling hot iron-teppans and use a utensil to carefully slide the frittata out of the pan.
